text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After a quick shower, I have breakfast and prepare for work. My job usually begins at 9 a.m., and I work in an office until around 5 p.m., with a lunch break in the middle. To stay healthy, I exercise for about 30 minutes after work—sometimes I go for a run or do yoga. In the evening, I cook dinner, relax by reading or watching a show, and then get ready for bed. This routine helps me feel productive and balanced every day.
